name: SafeArea

parameters.name: Top
parameters.description: Pads the top edge with env(safe-area-inset-top) (notch/status bar). Default true.

parameters.name: Bottom
parameters.description: Pads the bottom edge with env(safe-area-inset-bottom) (home indicator). Default true.

parameters.name: Left
parameters.description: Pads the left edge with env(safe-area-inset-left) (landscape notch). Default false.

parameters.name: Right
parameters.description: Pads the right edge with env(safe-area-inset-right) (landscape notch). Default false.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the root div, additive to the base lumeo-safe-area class.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Unmatched attributes splatted onto the root div. A caller-supplied class/style here is merged additively rather than overriding the computed inset padding.

mdSummary:
# SafeArea

Safe Area component.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Utility
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/safe-area

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| SafeArea | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| SafeArea | Top | `bool` | `true` | Pads the top edge with env(safe-area-inset-top) (notch/status bar). Default true. |
| SafeArea | Bottom | `bool` | `true` | Pads the bottom edge with env(safe-area-inset-bottom) (home indicator). Default true. |
| SafeArea | Left | `bool` | `false` | Pads the left edge with env(safe-area-inset-left) (landscape notch). Default false. |
| SafeArea | Right | `bool` | `false` | Pads the right edge with env(safe-area-inset-right) (landscape notch). Default false. |
| SafeArea | Class | `string?` | `` | Additional CSS classes merged onto the root div, additive to the base lumeo-safe-area class. |
| SafeArea | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` | Unmatched attributes splatted onto the root div. A caller-supplied class/style here is merged additively rather than overriding the computed inset padding. |

## Slots
- `ChildContent` (SafeArea) — RenderFragment slot

## Events
- (none)

## Sub-components
- (none)

## Cascading values it expects
- (none)

## Services it injects
- (none)

## Keyboard
—

## Example
```razor
<SafeArea />
```

## CSS variables
`--color-foreground`

## Files
- `UI/SafeArea/SafeArea.razor`
